---
title: "08 Gather Raw VCF"
author: "subhash"
date: "2025-10-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Purpose

Gather interval VCFs into one raw joint-called VCF.

# Inputs

- Ordered VCF list:
  `/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/genotype_vcfs/scripts/vcf_list_manifest_order.txt`

# Outputs

- Raw VCF:
  `/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/genotype_vcfs/RAW_vcf/RAW_SAP_BQSR.vcf.gz`

# Script

- `scripts/08_gather_raw_vcf/gather_raw_vcf.sbatch`

# Run

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
cd /work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb
sbatch genotype_vcfs/scripts/gather_raw_vcf.sbatch
```
